title: Jaimalya's Shaders
description: Beautifully vibrant, delightful to play with, coloured godrays, pixel-accurate shadows, w stunning stylized water, animated winds, custom weather effects and more
body:
With each step taken, block broken, terrain traveresed, mountain climed, village visited, river crossed, flight taken, night survived, rain witnessed, it brings _delight_.

There is nothing random, nothing left to be settled later, it is all.
Something as simple as rain, you look up to see the storm clouds form and spiral and drizzle slowly starts, something you would never do in vanilla, it brings delight where there was once annoyance, because someone else spent their love for you, someone has thought of you already, you feel considered.

## Features

- **Stylized Water** — Expressive, animated water with a Ghibli look
- **Semi Pixel-Accurate Shadows** — Sharp, grounded shadows that respect 
  the blocky aesthetic
- **Stylized Ambient Occlusion** — Soft contact shadows that add depth 
- **Bloom** — Natural light bleed around bright sources and emissives
- **Dynamic Wind** — Foliage and plants sway with fluid, layered animations, animated grass waves,like in ghibli films
- **Solid Lighting Engine** — Consistent, well-tuned lighting across all 
  biomes and times of day
- **Animated Clouds** - Winds, Hail, Rain, all are reflected with realtime animated cloud movements, including various types of clouds
- **Stylized Bloom & Glow** 
- **Realistic metallic** and polished block surfaces.
- **Wet Ground** reflections during rain.

## Performance

Jaimalya's Shaders is built to be efficient. It targets smooth framerates 
on mid-range hardware, making quality visuals accessible without a 
high-end GPU — and runs very well on macOS. Soon enough Vulkan will be supported, and the shader will grow even more effecient, because delight is best, shared.

## Compatibility

| Loader   | Supported |
|----------|-----------|
| Iris     | ✅        |
| OptiFine | ✅        |
| Fabric   | ✅        |
| Forge    | ✅        |
